free_text: Light and heavy water dynamic structure factor for
neutron transport codes
High Flux Reactor
Incoming neutron energies 16.9 and 67.6 meV
on IN4; 20 meV on IN5
384 position sensitive 3He detectors (3 m
heigh) on IN5; 300 3He tubes on IN4
Inelastic neutron scattering direct
time-of-flight spectrometer
Normalisation to counting time, energy-dependent
detector efficiency, and tilted container geometry.
Multiple scattering is estimated as 1% of the total
signal in measurements.
Standard deviation.
The error on the final cross section is the
combination of experimental errors and molecular
dynamics uncertainties. It is estimated to 1% of the
integrated cross-section.
Data received from E.Farhi
Inclusion approved by E.Farhi (2019-03-13)
M.M.
On. Data received from Emmanuel Farhi
Emmanuel Farhi + On. Recompiled.
barn/molecule
High purity water in aluminium flat container 0.25 mm
thick, sealed with indium wires. Sample is tilted by
45 deg w.r.t. the incoming beam.
Data sets from different incoming neutron energies and
molecular dynamics merged with spline interpolant.
Molecular dynamics was performed for 3921 heavy water
molecules and a TIP3P potential with NAMD 2.7.
Trajectories converted into dynamic structure factors
with nMoldyn/MDANSE (CHARMM 27).
ENDF B-VII.1 data used above 160 meV.
Finally S(alpha,beta) obtained from the experiment,
molecular dynamics and ENDF/B-VII.1 was converted to
the scattering cross section.
Emmanuel Farhi + On. Data inserted.
barn/molecule
High purity water in aluminium flat container 0.05 mm
thick, sealed with indium wires. Sample is tilted by
45 deg w.r.t. the incoming beam.
Data sets from different incoming neutron energies and
molecular dynamics merged with spline interpolant.
Molecular dynamics was performed for 3921 heavy water
molecules and a TIP3P potential with NAMD 2.7.
Trajectories converted into dynamic structure factors
with nMoldyn/MDANSE (CHARMM 27).
ENDF B-VII.1 data used above 15 meV.
Finally S(alpha,beta) obtained from the experiment,
molecular dynamics and ENDF/B-VII.1 was converted to
the scattering cross section.
Emmanuel Farhi + On. Data inserted.
